description: Full rebrand from ShoppingListAI to Gather — name, tagline, metadata, iOS config, legal, docs. Phased: Phase 1 unblocked, Phase 2 blocked on logo/colors, Phase 3 blocked on domain.

credentialRequirements.fallbackPlan: Local build and cap sync work; App Store submission blocked until portal is updated
All Phase 1 and Phase 2 stories proceed without domain; domain stories deferred

userStories.title: Update App Header Branding
userStories.description: Replace 'ShoppingListAI' with 'Gather' in the desktop header logo area and welcome/greeting text in src/App.jsx. Add tagline to desktop header.
acceptanceCriteria: Tagline 'Gather your lists, meals, and more.' visible in desktop header
No visual layout regression — same spacing, font weight, alignment
Works in both light and dark mode

userStories.title: Update Login Screen Branding
userStories.description: Replace 'ShoppingListAI' with 'Gather' on the login screen in src/components/Login.jsx. Add tagline below the app name.
acceptanceCriteria: Login screen shows 'Gather' as the app name
Tagline 'Gather your lists, meals, and more.' appears below the app name in a lighter/smaller font treatment
Login screen looks clean and balanced with the new text
Works in both light and dark mode

userStories.title: Update PWA Install Banner
userStories.description: Replace 'ShoppingListAI' with 'Gather' in the PWA install banner text in src/components/PWAInstallBanner.jsx. Include tagline in the banner description.
acceptanceCriteria: PWA install banner shows 'Gather' as the app name
Tagline 'Gather your lists, meals, and more.' appears in the banner
Banner layout and dismiss behavior unchanged
Works in both light and dark mode

userStories.title: Update Page Title & HTML Metadata
userStories.description: Update <title>, meta description, and apple-mobile-web-app-title in index.html to use 'Gather'.
acceptanceCriteria: Browser tab shows 'Gather' as page title

userStories.title: Update PWA Manifest
userStories.description: Update VitePWA plugin manifest config in vite.config.js: name, short_name, and description to reference 'Gather'.
acceptanceCriteria: PWA manifest name and short_name are 'Gather'
npm run build succeeds with updated manifest

userStories.title: Update package.json Name
userStories.description: Change the name field in package.json from 'shoppinglistai' to 'gather'.

userStories.title: Update Capacitor Config
userStories.description: Update appId to 'com.gather.app' and appName to 'Gather' in capacitor.config.ts.
userStories.notes: Changing bundle ID creates a new app identity in the App Store. User confirmed com.gather.app.

userStories.title: Update iOS Info.plist
userStories.description: Update CFBundleDisplayName, URL scheme name, and URL scheme identifier in ios/App/App/Info.plist to use 'Gather' and the new bundle ID 'com.gather.app'.

userStories.title: Update Xcode Project Bundle Identifiers
userStories.description: Update PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER entries in ios/App/App.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj from 'com.shoppinglistai' to 'com.gather.app'.
acceptanceCriteria: Xcode project file is valid and parseable

userStories.title: Update Privacy Policy
userStories.description: Replace all instances of 'ShoppingListAI' with 'Gather' in public/privacy.html and docs/app-store/privacy-policy.md.
acceptanceCriteria: Privacy policy HTML references 'Gather' throughout (no 'ShoppingListAI' remaining)

userStories.title: Update App Store Metadata
userStories.description: Update all App Store copy in docs/app-store/metadata.md and docs/app-store/app-privacy-labels.md to use 'Gather'. Add tagline to App Store description.
acceptanceCriteria: App Store subtitle includes tagline 'Gather your lists, meals, and more.'

userStories.title: Update Supabase Config
userStories.description: Update project_id in supabase/config.toml from ShoppingListAI-based name to gather-based name.

userStories.title: Update Internal Docs & Agent Config
userStories.description: Update docs/project.json name to 'Gather'. Update 'project' field in all 13 PRD JSON files in docs/prds/. Update docs/bugs/prd-bugs.json references. Update docs/review.md references.

userStories.title: Update SQL Migration Comments
userStories.description: Update comment headers in supabase/migrations/*.sql (4 files) that reference 'ShoppingListAI' to 'Gather'.
acceptanceCriteria: SQL files remain valid and executable

userStories.title: Update Service JSDoc
userStories.description: Update JSDoc comment in src/services/database.js (line ~2) referencing 'ShoppingListAI' to 'Gather'.

userStories.title: Replace Logo Assets
userStories.description: Replace current logo/icon across all touchpoints with new Gather logo. Generate sizes: favicon (16x16, 32x32), apple-touch-icon (180x180), PWA icons (192x192, 512x512). Update logo rendering in src/App.jsx and src/components/Login.jsx.
acceptanceCriteria: All icon sizes generated from the new logo
Favicon displays correctly in browser tabs
Apple touch icon renders on iOS home screen
App header and login screen show new logo
Works in both light and dark mode
userStories.notes: ⏳ BLOCKED — waiting for user to provide new logo image file

userStories.title: Update Brand Colors
userStories.description: Apply new brand color palette to CSS custom properties / design tokens. Update primary, secondary, and accent colors. Adjust dark mode palette.
acceptanceCriteria: All brand colors updated to new palette
Dark mode colors adjusted to complement new palette
Login screen, header, buttons, and accent elements all use new colors
Works in both light and dark mode
userStories.notes: ⏳ BLOCKED — waiting for user to provide new brand color palette
userStories.testIntensityReason: Visual styling across entire app, dark mode implications

userStories.title: Update CORS Origins in Edge Functions
userStories.description: Replace 'shoppinglistai.vercel.app' CORS origin with new custom domain in supabase/functions/search-products/index.ts and supabase/functions/search-images/index.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: Both edge functions accept requests from the new domain
Old domain removed from CORS allowlist (or kept temporarily for migration period)
Edge functions deploy successfully with supabase functions deploy
userStories.notes: ⏳ BLOCKED — waiting for user to purchase custom domain and configure DNS
userStories.testIntensityReason: Functional — breaks API calls if CORS origin is wrong

userStories.title: Update Apple Sign-In Config
userStories.description: Update Apple Sign-In clientId and redirectURI in src/context/AuthContext.jsx to use new bundle ID 'com.gather.app' and new domain.
acceptanceCriteria: Apple Sign-In flow works end-to-end (requires Apple Developer portal updates too)
userStories.notes: ⏳ BLOCKED — waiting for custom domain. Also requires Apple Developer portal Service ID update.

userStories.title: Update Universal Links & Entitlements
userStories.description: Update apple-app-site-association in public/.well-known/ with new bundle ID. Update App.entitlements associated domains to new domain.
acceptanceCriteria: AASA file contains new bundle ID 'com.gather.app' and correct paths
Entitlements reference new domain for associated domains
Universal Links verification passes on the new domain
userStories.testIntensityReason: Functional — breaks deep linking if wrong

userStories.title: Update Privacy Policy URLs
userStories.description: Update any URLs in public/privacy.html that reference 'shoppinglistai.vercel.app' to the new custom domain.
acceptanceCriteria: All URLs in privacy policy point to new domain

userStories.title: Rename ShoppingList React Components (Optional)
userStories.description: OPTIONAL — rename internal React component/context/hook names from 'ShoppingList' to a Gather-aligned name. Recommendation: SKIP this story. 'ShoppingList' is descriptive, not branding.
acceptanceCriteria: All component, context, hook, and import references updated consistently
userStories.notes: OPTIONAL — recommended to skip. ShoppingList is a descriptive term, not brand. Large refactor with risk and no user-facing benefit.
userStories.testIntensityReason: Large refactor across many files if done
